actors.name: Digidem Lab
actors.description: Swedish worker-owned cooperative specializing in design and development of methodologies for political and democratic innovation. Executed the historic Swedish Citizens' Assembly on Climate in 2024.
actors.contact_pathway: Co-founders of Nordic Deliberation with We Do Democracy; collaborated with Stockholm Resilience Centre
actors.notes: Direct collaborator candidate. Merges civic tech ethos of Spaceship with deliberative mechanisms of Assembly. Proven capability handling complex environmental governance simulations.

intel.value: Swedish Citizens' Assembly on Climate (Medborgarrad om klimatet) spring 2024; nine hybrid in-person and online meetings for randomly selected citizens; founding partner of Nordic Deliberation
Fairtrans Research Programme (Stockholm Resilience Centre, Uppsala University), We Do Democracy, Democracy X
Swedish worker-owned cooperative; executed Sweden's first national climate assembly; founding partner of Nordic Deliberation
Expertise in combining digital tools with physical deliberative spaces; excellent partners for hybrid governance prototyping
Worker-owned cooperative; hybrid model combining in-person and online deliberative meetings for randomly selected citizens
Develops methodologies and digital platforms for participatory democracy and citizen deliberation

actors.name: Nordic Blockchain Alliance
actors.description: Cross-border initiative funded by Nordic Innovation exploring joint Nordic blockchain ecosystem, targeting lifestyle and design industries for circular business model transition and European Product Passport compliance.
actors.contact_pathway: Relates to blockchain-for-ecology space occupied by Single.Earth
actors.notes: Not a direct collaborator candidate. Testing technological infrastructure for tracking ecological footprint of global supply chains in decentralized manner.

intel.value: Common Nordic knowledge pool and toolbox for SMEs; decentralized ledger for product data exchange, supply chain history tracking, environmental impact measurement, regulatory compliance
Nordic Innovation, lifestyle and design SMEs across the Nordics
Pan-Nordic cross-border initiative addressing European Product Passport requirements through joint blockchain ecosystem
Technological infrastructure for tracking ecological footprint of global supply chains; groundwork for alternative ownership and accountability models

actors.name: Demokrati Garage
actors.description: Independent NGO and physical gathering place in Copenhagen functioning as a DIY workshop and development platform for democratic innovation. Co-founded by leadership of We Do Democracy.
actors.contact_pathway: Direct offshoot/partner of We Do Democracy
actors.notes: Direct collaborator candidate. Physical and cultural infrastructure for governance experimentation. Ideal real-world anchor for planetary governance simulations.

intel.value: Physical innovation hub for democratic experimentation; incubator for new participatory formats; bridges grassroots civic action and institutional policy reform
Copenhagen-based physical hub uniting Denmark's democracy sector
Physical space dedicated to democratic innovation; perfect site for hosting prototype or simulation of the Assembly
Open DIY workshop philosophy; democracy requires continuous maintenance, expansion, and practical experimentation

projects.name: Swedish Citizens' Assembly on Climate
projects.description: Historic national climate assembly (Medborgarrad om klimatet) convened spring 2024 to generate policy proposals on reducing national greenhouse gas emissions through nine hybrid meetings

intel.value: Hybrid model of nine in-person and online meetings for randomly selected citizens deliberating on greenhouse gas emission reduction
Nordic Blockchain Alliance relates to blockchain-for-ecology space; exploring similar decentralized ledger technology for environmental tracking
